movies.title: Welcome to One World
movies.shortDescription: Dive into the exciting One World of Science!

movies.title: What is the National Science Foundation
movies.shortDescription: Find out about all the exciting work that the NSF do and how they contribute to society!

movies.title: What is Shifting Baseline Syndrome?
movies.shortDescription: Shifting Baseline Syndrome is how our perception of environmental changes can be altered over time, affecting our understanding of ecological health and conservation efforts.

movies.title: What is Nuclear Energy?
movies.shortDescription: Nuclear energy is energy produced by the nucleus of an atom. There are two atomic reactions that produce nuclear energy; Fission and Fusion.

movies.title: What is the Ozone Layer
movies.shortDescription: Find out about all the Ozone Layer?

movies.title: National Radio Quiet Zone | Protecting the Radio Spectrum in New Ways
movies.shortDescription: This film looks at the importance of the National Quiet Zone to help us to continue to make important discoveries about our universe , and how in an age of increased technological noise it is important to preserve and adapt these Quiet Zones not only to protect the investment in into radio astronomy but also to safeguard the future of cosmic exploration

movies.title: Restoring Lost Reefs
movies.shortDescription: In a groundbreaking discovery, researchers at the University of Adelaide uncovered a lost ecosystem of oyster reefs that once covered entire gulfs in South Australia. This revelation came when a student presented a map showing the extensive coverage of these reefs, challenging the current understanding of the region’s marine ecology.

movies.title: The Library of Earth’s History
movies.shortDescription: In our quest to understand Earth’s past and prepare for its future, scientific ocean drilling emerges as a crucial tool. The International Ocean Discovery Program (IODP) leads the charge in this fascinating field, offering unprecedented insights into our planet’s history and potential future.

movies.title: What is the Global Roadmap for Urban Nature Based Solutions?
movies.shortDescription: Cities are expanding at a pace humanity has never seen before. More people, more buildings, more pressure on the systems that keep life running.
